base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of vehicles — a character (mount_or_vehicle) from 1991 final fantasy iv. Vehicles — Baron Hovercraft, Enterprise Airship, Big Whale spaceship, Chocobo mount, Black Chocobo (fly overworld). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Vehicles — Baron Hovercraft, Enterprise Airship, Big Whale spaceship, Chocobo mount, Black Chocobo (fly overworld)
